title: feat(mlx,autoresearch): harden search reliability and mlx iteration safety
author: RyanLisse

data.description: Added bounded candidate retry helpers and explicit exhaustion errors in autoresearch random/evolution/code flows to improve search reliability.
Hardened CUDA/MLX metric parsing and added targeted regression tests plus a just test quality gate.
Made MLX iteration reliable and fast with compile-safe sparse FFN residual handling and MLX_COMPILE_SANITY_ONLY / MLX_SKIP_VALIDATION modes.

novel_contributions: Bounded candidate retry helpers for autoresearch random/evolution/code flows
Explicit exhaustion errors when candidate search is depleted
Added regression tests and a just test quality gate
Compile-safe sparse FFN residual handling for MLX iteration
Support for MLX_COMPILE_SANITY_ONLY and MLX_SKIP_VALIDATION modes
